text: SPEAKER_01: Hello. SPEAKER_00: Hello, this is Hina speaking. SPEAKER_00: Yes. SPEAKER_00: Hi, I am calling from Latvia Academy. SPEAKER_00: Did you search about makeup courses? SPEAKER_00: Yes. SPEAKER_00: Where do you live? SPEAKER_00: Noida, 73. SPEAKER_00: Okay, then you must be comfortable to come in 62, right? SPEAKER_00: If you go, can you attend free trial class or what? SPEAKER_01: Yes. SPEAKER_00: So, are you interested in makeup in particular or makeup, skin, hair, are you watching some combined courses? SPEAKER_00: Hello. SPEAKER_00: Hello. SPEAKER_00: I was just asking if you are interested in makeup or makeup, skin, hair, cutting, etc. Yes, everything. SPEAKER_00: Skin and hair, etc. Okay. SPEAKER_00: You can see for cosmetology. SPEAKER_00: Usually, cosmetology ends in 4-6 months. SPEAKER_00: In that, hair cutting, colouring, hair styling, RT, bridal engagement, all makeup also comes, BOP syllabus also comes. SPEAKER_00: Facial threading, beach threading, etc. SPEAKER_00: And the product used in the class is also provided by the teacher nearby. SPEAKER_00: There are 2-3 things that you bring with you, like make-up brush, hair cutting, scissors, and tail comb. SPEAKER_00: These are the two things that you have to bring in your class. SPEAKER_00: Thread, plucker, nail filer, what you have to bring in the UP class. SPEAKER_00: Rest, whatever product is left to be used, the teacher provides it to you nearby. SPEAKER_00: If you want, you can visit for trial class. SPEAKER_00: If you can visit, then some offers were available for 3-4 seats. SPEAKER_00: So you can get this course in the current offers for 74,000 per round. SPEAKER_00: If you want, you can also pay in 12 months easy MIs. SPEAKER_00: So 5-5,000 per month MIs will be made. SPEAKER_00: And admission is also only 7-8,600. SPEAKER_00: What will be the classes time? SPEAKER_00: Classes are available in two timings. SPEAKER_00: You can take it from 10 to 1 pm. SPEAKER_00: Otherwise, it is from 2.30 to 5.30 pm. SPEAKER_00: You can take that too. SPEAKER_00: Yes. SPEAKER_00: You can come any day and find out. SPEAKER_00: You can take a trial class. SPEAKER_00: Whatever option you like. SPEAKER_00: By the way, courses are also available in the short term. SPEAKER_00: You will also get it within 50,000-55,000. SPEAKER_00: Of course, scaling, makeup and hair styling combo. SPEAKER_00: In that also, again, we provide placements. SPEAKER_00: So, whatever you like, you can talk to your family and tell them. SPEAKER_00: How long will you get the certificate? SPEAKER_00: When your course is over, the certificate comes within 20 days. SPEAKER_00: How will the payment be done? SPEAKER_00: We have reduced the EMI from 50% to 40% interest. SPEAKER_00: The course fee is the same as it is now. SPEAKER_00: So obviously giving 3-4 thousand to every child becomes a little comparatively easy. SPEAKER_00: And side by side, when half of the course is completed, then along with that, they start taking bookings for freelancing. SPEAKER_00: For example, the bookings for pre-bride and brides come with the child. SPEAKER_00: Along with that, they also generate their income. SPEAKER_00: Right? SPEAKER_00: So after knowing this, tell us what else you want to do from the time you want to start. SPEAKER_00: Once I sent a list of makeup courses to many people. SPEAKER_00: There are 4-5 makeup courses, not all of them will be of your use. SPEAKER_00: It totally depends on how good your first level marks are or what all things are included in it. SPEAKER_00: So, what I just told you is the combo of the combined course. SPEAKER_00: If you do makeup only for basic 12 months, then you will get makeup only for 1,10,000 rupees. SPEAKER_00: There is nothing other than makeup and hair styling in it. SPEAKER_00: I have almost 35 courses. SPEAKER_00: If you look at 35 courses, you will be 100% confused. SPEAKER_00: You will not understand which was the first level, which was the second level, what is basic, what is advanced. SPEAKER_00: So when you visit, I will tell you the duration-wise difference, then I will also be able to tell you that after which course, what kind of job vacancy is applied, how much salary you get easily. SPEAKER_00: Otherwise, I have written all the courses on the website, read it. SPEAKER_00: Anyway, all the details of the course are written on it along with the salary. SPEAKER_00: But the thing is that the fee structure is different from center to center and offer is different. SPEAKER_00: So definitely you will have to pay for it. SPEAKER_00: There is no such free consultation. SPEAKER_00: There are no charges. SPEAKER_00: Sir, I will share the location with you. SPEAKER_00: I will share the details of the recent placement two years. SPEAKER_00: I will share some student work. SPEAKER_00: You can see all the levels on the website. SPEAKER_00: I will forward it to you in a brochure. SPEAKER_00: Okay. SPEAKER_00: Okay. SPEAKER_00: Thank you.
